w:r.w:t: [Begin section content here. Use BR Body style for all paragraph text.]

[Begin section content here. Use BR Body style for all paragraph text.]
[Sub-section body text. Use Heading 2 for sub-sections within each major section.]
Delete this page before sending. For the full style guide, refer to BlueRidge_StyleGuide_Template.docx.
BR Doc Title — Calibri Light 26pt, BR Navy
BR Subtitle — Calibri Italic 13pt, BR Blue Med
Heading 1 — Calibri Light 18pt, BR Blue, orange underline
Heading 2 — Calibri Bold 14pt, BR Blue Med
BR Body — Calibri 11pt, Gray Dark, 1.15 spacing
BR Callout — Bold, Navy text, Blue Light background
BR Caption — Italic 9pt, Gray Mid, centered
